hero.title: FARREL AD
hero.subtitle: BACKEND SYSTEMS / IoT / DATA ENGINEERING
hero.tagline: I build backend systems, IoT platforms, and data engineering solutions -- with a growing interest in machine learning.

backend.title: Backend Engineering
backend.desc: Designing resilient backend architectures, optimizing relational database schemas, and building high-performance REST APIs with PHP and Node.js.

data.title: Data Engineering
data.desc: Structuring high-throughput ETL workflows, managing time-series databases, and building real-time telemetry ingestion pipelines.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: Exploring machine learning model deployment, local inference engines, and semantic vector pipelines.

list.title: Basic RESTful API in PHP
list.desc: A foundational REST API built in native PHP with MySQL, demonstrating manual routing, PDO prepared statements, and clean JSON response formatting.

list.title: Luminous IoT
list.desc: A real-time IoT monitoring dashboard bridging MQTT sensor telemetry with a Symfony web application, featuring live gauges, timeline charts, and bidirectional device control.

list.title: PrintX
list.desc: A browser-based mail merge tool that generates print-ready PDFs from spreadsheet data and design templates, with a visual drag-and-drop canvas editor and 300 DPI rendering.

list.title: IoT Smart Farming API
list.desc: A fully dockerized NestJS platform simulating a smart farming IoT system with MQTT telemetry ingestion, TimescaleDB time-series storage, and automated CI/CD deployment.

list.title: JavaScript Linear Regression
list.desc: A from-scratch linear regression model in pure JavaScript with CLI and web interfaces, featuring Chart.js visualization and zero ML library dependencies.

list.title: Crowd Counting Model Deployment
list.desc: A PyTorch crowd counting model deployed across Flask, FastAPI, and Express.js with ONNX conversion, featuring a drag-and-drop web UI for real-time people detection.

contact.sub: Feel free to reach out for project discussions, system design review, or data pipeline collaborations.

blog.title: TECHNICAL BLOG
blog.subtitle: Writing about Backend Architecture, Data Systems, and AI Integration.
